CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-22-2016 Continued To Feb-15-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Entry Of Default And Default Judgment Against Defendant Thuy Bich Thi Do
Off Calendar Nov-23-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

No notice of contest was provided to the Court. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant Thuy Thi Bich Do's motion to set aside entry of default and default judgment is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Do made the motion within six months of entry of judgment and has shown that judgment was taken through Defendant's mistaken, inadvertence, surprise or excusable neglect. (See Code Civ. Proc., 473, subd. (b).) Order signed. The order was modified to reflect the date of entry of the default and the default judgment.

Judge: Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. (302/JQ)
